Extract normalized gene expression

Source: R/utilities.R
extract_expression.Rd

Extract normalized or variance-stabilized expression values from a DESeq2 object and return a long-format table.

Usage

extract_expression(
  dds,
  metadata,
  genes,
  assay = c("vst", "normalized", "log2_normalized", "raw"),
  gene_col = "SYMBOL",
  collapse_fun = sum
)

Arguments

dds

DESeqDataSet object.

metadata

Sample metadata.

genes

Character vector of gene symbols or identifiers.

assay

One of "vst", "normalized", "log2_normalized" or "raw".

gene_col

Character. Column containing gene names or identifiers in rowData(dds).

collapse_fun

Function used to collapse duplicated gene rows.

Value

Long-format expression table.
